MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, CSR: David Davenport, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Appearances:
Steven A. Booska, Esq. for Plaintiff The Education Resources Institute, Inc.
After hearing plaintiff's declaration, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff The Education Resources Institute, Inc. and against the defendant Quan V. Nguyen
Damages of $42,225.49
Attorney's fees of $10,000.00
Costs of $264.50
Interest of $6,113.64
For the total of $58,603.63
Does 1-10 Dismissal filed
Judgment signed in open court.
